narrative.hook: I build technical companies, technical leverage, and technical trust.
narrative.body:
My work sits at the intersection of product, systems, security, AI/ML, and education: building things people can use, building platforms teams can scale, and explaining complex technology in a way that creates adoption.

That combination has shown up across founder-led education businesses, cloud and innovation work, financial technology, AI/ML systems, cybersecurity, and open-source engineering.

experience.title: Founder
highlights: Designing next-generation compute runtime and infrastructure systems focused on deterministic execution, zero-copy data movement, and Rust-first performance.
Building architecture around runtime design, workflow systems, secure execution, and future-facing AI infrastructure.

experience.title: Chief Innovation Officer
highlights: Led strategic innovation initiatives driving $10M+ in new product development.
Architected cloud-native, multi-tenant core banking platform serving 100K+ customers.
Built secure AI-native banking infrastructure reducing fraud by 85%.
Introduced AI-powered chatbots for customer support, reducing response time by 50%.
Resolved critical vulnerabilities preventing $10M+ in potential losses.
Led 7-person engineering team overhauling end-of-life legacy banking platform to modern cloud-native architecture while maintaining 99.9% uptime.

Automated 5 core banking features using AI/ML techniques, including transaction reconciliation, fraud detection, customer onboarding, compliance monitoring, and loan approval workflows; reduced manual effort by 80% and improved process accuracy by 95%.
Led security team to achieve SOC 2 Type II compliance with 100% audit coverage.
Designed and delivered customer acquisition and retention campaigns, driving measurable growth in customer base.
Built and managed CI/CD pipeline for long-term management of 10+ microservices.
Transitioned machine acquisition from manual to automated, reducing time to market by 80%.

experience.title: Chief Technical Officer
highlights: Built and scaled blockchain-based financial infrastructure processing 300k/s in transactions.
Designed and implemented security framework for on-chain and multi-chain transactions.
Developed comprehensive cybersecurity strategy achieving SOC 2 Type II compliance.
Automated feature development with AI/ML, reducing development time by 50% and improving accuracy by 90% for 3 major product features.
Led 5-person engineering team delivering core infrastructure.
Designed and implemented identity and access management systems.
Designed and documented physical policies and procedures for on-device security.
Automated onboarding of new machines to the cluster, streamlining infrastructure expansion and management.
Collaborated with key stakeholders to define and implement high-priority features for the product roadmap while maintaining a consistent, high-quality codebase.
Advised congressional representatives on blockchain technology and cryptocurrency, providing expert guidance on industry trends and regulatory considerations.

experience.title: Senior Technology Lead
highlights: Designed and implemented a distributed machine learning platform for real-time data processing and model training in the healthcare space.
Designed and deployed AI/ML systems processing 100K+ data points daily for sports analytics.
Utilized AWS to build scalable and secure infrastructure for internal and external customers.
Designed, implemented, and maintained a robust CI/CD pipeline automating testing, deployment, and monitoring for critical, high-availability systems.
Designed and implemented open-source software for internal and external customers, including distributed machine learning infrastructure for real-time data processing and model training.
Mentored 25+ junior engineers and consultants, improving team productivity by 40%.
Developed comprehensive technical documentation and interactive training programs, accelerating onboarding and empowering teams to adopt new systems efficiently.
Designed blockchain-based infrastructure for secure and transparent data within data platforms.

experience.title: Founder & CTO
highlights: Founded and scaled technology education company to 50K+ students and $2M+ annual revenue.
Traveled across 5 continents, leading training sessions for 1,000+ students globally, ranging from the US Navy to continuing education programs in the US, Europe, Asia, and the Middle East.
Created and delivered cross-market training programs, including distributed remote training and mentorship for global teams.
Designed and led comprehensive curriculum covering full-stack development, cybersecurity, and machine learning.
Authored 10 technical textbooks with 100K+ copies sold globally in 6 different languages.
Created publishing platform for technical content collaboration between authors and readers.
Designed and implemented 5 open-source software projects ranging from interactive learning platforms to book-publishing curriculum design and publishing.

experience.title: Founder
highlights: Developed computer vision algorithms to automate yield estimation and quality assessment for fresh produce, increasing forecasting accuracy for growers.
Designed and implemented a scalable web application enabling real-time crop monitoring, task management, and analytics for strawberry and blueberry farms.
Integrated IoT sensor data and satellite imagery to provide actionable insights for optimizing irrigation, fertilization, and harvest timing.
Collaborated with agronomists and field teams to translate agricultural workflows into intuitive digital tools, improving user adoption and operational transparency.
Built automated reporting and alerting systems to notify growers of anomalies and optimize resource allocation across multiple farm locations.

experience.title: Core Instructor
highlights: Taught full-stack development, ranging from frontend to backend, to 1,000+ in-person students.
Developed core software engineering curriculum for 1,000+ students.
Mentored students to successfully transition from the classroom to professional software engineering careers.
Created a software interview course to help students ace technical and soft skill interviews.
Designed and led cybersecurity curriculum for 1,000+ students focusing on penetration testing, vulnerability assessment, and threat intelligence.
Designed and taught machine learning curriculum for 1,000+ students focusing on deep learning, reinforcement learning, and natural language processing.

experience.title: Engineer
highlights: Built core infrastructure for ZenPayroll, now Gusto, focusing on security, scalability, and performance.
Designed and implemented lightweight backend systems to support rapid product growth.
Collaborated with UI and core engineering teams to deliver a seamless payroll experience.
Ensured infrastructure met compliance and security standards for sensitive PII payroll data.
Contributed to bringing the product to market through cross-functional teamwork and agile development.

experience.title: Innovation Evangelist
highlights: Led internal and external innovation initiatives, driving adoption of cutting-edge technologies and fostering a culture of experimentation across AT&T.
Architected and built the initial versions of the AT&T API platform, empowering external developers to integrate with AT&T services.
Designed and implemented the mHealth platform, enabling secure, scalable healthcare solutions and partnerships.
Developed enterprise solutions including single sign-on services and a next-generation text messaging gateway.
Established and supported AT&T Labs in Palo Alto, Plano, and Tel Aviv, collaborating with global teams to bring new ideas to market.
Presented and pitched innovation initiatives to executive leadership, driving strategic decisions and product direction.

projects.name: Hologram — Geometric Compute Runtime
projects.desc: Built a software-defined compute runtime that compiles AI and data workloads into deterministic execution plans, enabling constant-time execution across CPU, GPU, and WebGPU without runtime overhead.

projects.name: AgentZero
projects.desc: Built a self-evolving AI agent runtime in Rust where agents generate tools, coordinate as swarms, and persist learned behaviors across executions.

projects.name: MVM — MicroVM Platform
projects.desc: Built a developer-first microVM platform for reproducible, secure workloads using Nix and sub-second boot virtualization across Firecracker and multiple backends.

projects.name: RoboRef
projects.desc: Built a real-time computer vision system for tracking referees and gameplay, enabling autonomous camera control and low-latency edge inference in dynamic environments.

projects.name: Fabric
projects.desc: Built a backend control plane that unifies identity, authorization, workflows, and AI routing into a single composable runtime, replacing traditional platform infrastructure.

projects.name: rq
projects.desc: Built a Rust AST toolkit for querying, transforming, and generating code for documentation, tutorials, and developer workflows.

side_cards.title: HIGHLIGHTS
items: Founder-operator building platforms across compute, AI systems, and infrastructure.
Architect of high-performance systems spanning runtimes, control planes, and distributed workflows.
Educator and author reaching 50K+ developers with 100K+ books distributed globally.
Open-source contributor with 400+ repositories across systems, security, and developer tooling.

side_cards.title: OPEN SOURCE SIGNAL
items: GitHub: 427 repositories and 5k+ stars on public profile
Open-source work spans infrastructure, testing, certificates, RabbitMQ tooling, cloud systems, AST tooling, and AI/ML infrastructure
Public bio emphasizes technologist, cybersecurity, AI/ML, and open-source systems

side_cards.title: CORE COMPETENCIES
items: Programming & Systems: Rust, Golang, Python, C/C++, Assembly, TypeScript/JavaScript, Java, SQL — focused on high-performance systems, runtime design, and low-level execution models
Distributed Systems & Infrastructure: AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Ansible, CI/CD — designing multi-tenant, fault-tolerant, and horizontally scalable platforms
AI/ML Systems: Machine learning, deep learning, reinforcement learning, NLP, computer vision — building real-time training, inference, and agent-based systems
Security & Compliance: Cryptography, threat modeling, secure system design, privacy, SOC 2 — implementing defense-in-depth architectures across applications and infrastructure
Workflow & Platform Architecture: DAG-based orchestration, control planes, event-driven systems, job scheduling, and backend system design
Leadership & Execution: Technical leadership, team building, mentorship, cross-functional execution, and driving strategy from architecture through delivery

side_cards.title: INTERESTS
items: Officiating youth sports (Flag and Tackle football, basketball, and softball
